scope: zero-training test of whether target-free expanded parent geometry resolves the global-coloring collisions that invalidated the Q1 unary scorer

scientific_contract.site_family: faithful parent-action signature plus the sorted exact-CVP periodic distance environment of each expanded species-free site
scientific_contract.pair_family: endpoint site descriptors, pair distance and the unordered two-point distance view to every third site; no carrier-local orbit ID
scientific_contract.target_role: the observed coloring selects a collision class and is never an input to a site or pair descriptor
scientific_contract.invariances: node relabeling and unimodular GL(3,Z) cell-basis changes must preserve all descriptors
scientific_contract.scope_limit: identifiability only; normalization and learnability remain separate requirements

decision_rule.pass: geometry-resolved occupation is identifiable enough to design one separately frozen count-exact, exactly normalized IID oracle-C training Gate
decision_rule.fail: do not train; identify whether remaining collisions need a higher-order geometry descriptor or an assignment-level latent law
decision_rule.boundary: This audit cannot qualify assignment, generated-C, p(N), L1/M1, tensor conditioning, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
